skip_reason: Individual Snapchat Spotlight post URLs are not permanently stable - the storyId in the URL can change or the specific post can be removed/replaced over time, which would break this test unpredictably even though the bookmarklet itself still works. Skipping until a guaranteed-stable public Spotlight post URL is identified.
notes: Passive - reads JSON-LD script tags (looking for a SocialMediaPosting node in '@graph', or falls back to regex on 'uploadDate'/'datePublished'/'contentUrl') and shows a draggable modal titled 'Snapchat Spotlight Data' with attribution 'Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training'. Failure path alerts 'No date data found on this page.' if neither uploadDate nor datePublished is found. If un-skipped in the future, checks should include modal_appears on 'Snapchat Spotlight Data' plus text_present on 'strong' for the date values.

checks.comment: At least one strong element with date content
